pages.title: Hydraulic theology
pages.text: Blood is both fluid and currency. Source blocks behave like thin lava visually but obey mod-specific collision rules — bucket them like water sources once you own $(rev)Bucket of Blood$(warn).$(br2)Blood fills altar contracts, converts into jars for rituals, and stains Isaac-themed ammunition.

pages.title: Jar of Blood
pages.text: Portable offering unit accepted $(bold)only$(warn) by the Summoning Altar's blood slot.
